summary: Iteration 72: Crystals & Stones Encyclopedia, Rock Hounding Game, Quantum Entanglement, Light Celestial Theme - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new pages and features verified working. Crystal encyclopedia shows 12 crystals with full details, Rock Hounding game has 4 environments, Quantum Entanglement has 5 paired meditations, Settings page now has 5 themes including Light Celestial.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified 4 new features: (1) Crystals & Stones Encyclopedia at /crystals with 12 crystals, category/search filters, detail modal with spiritual/healing info, collection management, (2) Rock Hounding game with 4 environments (riverbed-easy, volcanic-medium, ocean-medium, mountain-hard), 3 digs per day limit, 70% find chance, (3) Quantum Entanglement at /entanglement with 5 paired meditations (heart-sync, third-eye-link, root-ground, crown-ascend, aura-merge), session creation/joining/completion, (4) Light Celestial theme in Settings (5 themes total). Navigation Explore dropdown includes Crystals & Stones and Entanglement links. All existing features (subscriptions, star-chart, trade-circle, settings) still working.

backend_api.GET /api/crystals: ✓ Returns 12 crystals with full details (id, name, aka, color, category, chakra, element, zodiac, hardness, rarity, description, spiritual, healing, uses)
backend_api.GET /api/crystals?search=love: ✓ Filters by search term (finds Rose Quartz)
backend_api.GET /api/entanglement/my-sessions: ✓ Returns user's session history with stats

frontend_ui.crystals_tabs: ✓ Encyclopedia, My Collection, Rock Hounding tabs present

frontend_ui.crystal_detail_modal: ✓ Opens with spiritual significance, healing properties, uses, Add to Collection button
frontend_ui.entanglement_stats: ✓ Shows Sessions, Completed, Open Now stats
frontend_ui.entanglement_tabs: ✓ Start Session, Join, My Sessions tabs present
frontend_ui.settings_page_loads: ✓ /settings loads with Sound, Visual, Account sections
frontend_ui.settings_themes: ✓ 5 themes: Dark Cosmic, Deep Midnight, Warm Earth, Sacred Forest, Light Celestial
frontend_ui.nav_explore_dropdown: ✓ Contains Crystals & Stones and Entanglement links
